decision: Climbed Row017 with an independent local ComfyUI W69 inpaint-micro_v2 runtime + direct whole-frame visual QA (canonical pass). Historical MICRO_V3 pass_with_notes retained. Prior W69 nomouth/eyeonly/contact-shadow and MF70 climbs retained. face_mask_v1 remains unused/prepared (not tip-passed). This does not complete historical normalization.
remaining_blocker: Row017 cannot complete until remaining historical localized visual-review records are classified into canonical pre/post, target, non-target, six-category, and global-rejection evidence, and future localized candidates continue to clear whole-frame rejection gates.
next_action: Climb prepared unused face_mask_v1 only if still not tip-passed and assets remain; or continue historical canonicalization backlog. Keep Row017 Blocked_Canonical_…; leave Row075 PID alone; do not claim COMPLETE.

contradiction_resolution.other_climber_claim: all W69 tip-passed and BLOCKED with no commits

No ROW017_LOCAL_W69_INPAINT_MICRO_V2 tip review existed before this climb; historical MICRO_V3 is pass_with_notes only. face_mask_v1 also lacked tip review. Inventory claim was correct for micro_v2.
